medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Admitted with saddle pulmonary embolism; elective admission for port placement complicated by hemopneumothorax and hypotension. Developed acute shortness of breath and tachycardia on POD#1. Transfused with 2 units PRBCs, one unit of platelets. Chest tube placed draining 250cc of blood. Not anticoagulated due to recent bleed. Diagnosed with diffuse large B cell lymphoma.
medical_history.past_medical_history: Recent diagnosis of lymphoma, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia, Hypothyroidism, GERD, Arthritis, OSA, CAD s/p stenting, ovarian cancer, IVC filter placement, TAHBSO, cholecystectomy.
medical_history.family_history: Father had a CVA, Mother had a CVA.

physical_examination.general_examination: Vitals: T: 98.6, BP: 152/66-119/64, HR: 83-104, RR: 20, O2: 96% on 2L. No complaints; speaks complete sentences.
physical_examination.specialty_examination: Neurological: awake, alert, speech fluent, face symmetric. Cardiovascular: S1, S2 regular rhythm, normal rate. Lungs: unlabored, decreased breath sounds left base. Trace edema in extremities.
